ocr_findings.description: The RAID levels table (RAID 0–6 with説明 column) in the OCR is wrapped in a fenced code block (```html ... ```) instead of a proper markdown table. While the content is present and correct, the code-block wrapping means downstream processors may not parse it as a table, losing structured data semantics.

OCR heading markers use '## 0- ストライピング' and '## 0- ミラーリング' — the '0-' prefix is spurious and does not appear in the image (image uses the '◎' symbol icon before section headings). This is a symbol-to-text substitution artefact.

Image shows section header '10-03 ハードディスクの多重化 (RAID)' at top and page number '361' at bottom right; page number is present on line 2 of OCR but the section header appears only on line 1, consistent with image. No loss.
Source citation line '『基礎から押さえるRAID講座 vol.12』(https://...)を参考に一部改変' present in OCR — matches image footnote under table. Correct.

reviewer_notes: Page covers RAID levels 0–6 in a summary table followed by detailed explanations of ストライピング (RAID 0) and ミラーリング (RAID 1). Table content is complete but wrapped in a code block instead of markdown table syntax — med severity structural issue. Section heading icons rendered as '0-' prefix is a minor artefact. All explanatory body text for RAID 0 and RAID 1 is accurately captured including the availability and speed trade-off discussion.
